use_cases: FAQ sections where users expand questions to reveal answers
Settings panels with collapsible configuration groups
Documentation sidebars with expandable navigation sections
Product detail pages with expandable specifications and features
Admin dashboards with collapsible filter or category panels
ai_summary: A lightweight accordion component built with Radix UI primitives featuring smooth expand/collapse animations and a rotating chevron indicator. The component supports keyboard navigation through native Radix behavior and uses Tailwind CSS for clean, minimal styling with proper accessibility semantics.
